$comment: Canonical engineering baseline for the @cosyte/* parser repos. scripts/drift-check.js fails when a repo diverges. The authoritative prose is the meta-repo documentation/conventions.md; this is its machine-checkable shadow. Until Phases D/E migrate each parser, drift here is EXPECTED — it is the worklist.
pnpmOverridesComment: Canonical pnpm.overrides every parser must carry — Dependabot dev/build-time advisory remediation. esbuild: GHSA dev-server path-traversal (not reachable; repos build via tsup/vitest, never `esbuild serve`). js-yaml@4: GHSA-h67p-54hq-rp68 quadratic merge-key DoS. KNOWN RESIDUAL (not pinnable): js-yaml@3.14.2 reached via read-yaml-file@1.1.0 (@manypkg/get-packages → @changesets/cli) calls yaml.safeLoad, which throws in js-yaml 4 — cannot force-upgrade without breaking release tooling; it only parses trusted local repo YAML at release time.
